title: Weaponry
description: A small mod that aims to overhaul vanilla combat.
body:
# Weaponry currently adds only Greatswords but as the mod continues development i plan to add more, the idea is to add multiple different types of tiered weapons, all unique in their own ways to not take away from using vanilla weapons and to not make an objectively best weapon, but to allow for more diversity in pvp. # ![a diamond greatsword being held by a player](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TTvWohso/images/83b993fb4182ae773445a0a4c045cd365560242b.png) A Diamond Greatsword being held by a player. ##

Extra Info

| Features | Images | |:-:|:-:| | The **Netherite Horse Armor** is a backport of the same thing from the 1.21.11 Mounts Of Mayhem Update, giving your horse 19 Armor and the same Armor Toughness and Knockback Resistance as all netherite Armors | ![horse armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b3f860d8e4c151a408ff00eb707a69d95e39e73.png) | | The **Greatswords** scale in damage similar to the **Sword** with higher damage capping out at the same as the **Axe**, with an extra 0.75 entity reach and is visually double handed. | ![greatsword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d412c2272d3be30e2608b88ae6a7e029c7f03b1.png) | ##

Before You Ask

**

Q: Can i use this project in my published modpacks?

**

A: of course, you can do this with any of my projects aslong as the download stays hosted within the modrinth ecosystem :3
